positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical cosmic mandala featuring glowing geometric constellations, stylized bioluminescent flora, and wispy nebulae elements. The design must have a clean silhouette, strong central focus, and extreme contrast, emphasizing deep midnight blues, royal purples, emerald green, and electric gold accents. Style must be highly detailed vector art mixed with neo-pop illustration aesthetics, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition should be perfectly contained within the frame, isolated on a solid background for maximum print contrast. Intricate symmetry, maximalist detail, smooth vector lines, clean art deco geometry.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, signature, border, extra limbs, bad anatomy, malformed, noise, jpeg artifacts, dirty, poor composition, realistic photo, bokeh
